questions.question:
A Cube of side 4 cm is cut into 64 equal parts which are numbered from 1 to 64 in such a manner.The cube is single Diagonal cut.

Now find the sum of the elements of the cubes which are cut by the single diagonal cut.



Quantitative Aptitude: This is a popular question from Cubes chapter of Quantitative Aptitude Mathematics

1)if six cuts are made to cube what isax no of pieces obtained?

2)if 10 cuts are made on cube what is max no of pieces obtained?

3)what is min no of cuts to obtain 216 identical pieces?

4)what is min no of cuts required to cut cube in 24 pieces?

5)27 identical cubes are aranged to form larger cube.How many such cubes are required to completely cover larger cube so that figure obtained is also cube?

1)125 2)98 3)80 4)64


Quantitative Aptitude: cubes
